# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Docker Compose file for ELK Stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana) and APM Server. Configure all services with network settings. Set up communication between components.
# Category: monitoring_misconfiguration

version: '3'
services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:7.10.2
    container_name: es
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    environment:
      - node.name=es
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.seed_hosts=kibana,logstash
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - cluster.initial_master_nodes=es
    networks:
      - elk-network

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:7.10.2
    container_name: logstash
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
      - "9600:9600"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - FORWARD_CLIENT_ Certificate=false
      - path.data=/usr/share/logstash/data
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=true
      - xpack.monitoring.host=elasticsearch
      - xpack.reporting.enabled=true
    volumes:
      - ./logs:/usr/share/logstash/data
    networks:
      - elk-network

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:7.10.2
    container_name: kibana
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
    networks:
      - elk-network

  apm-server:
    image: docker.elastic.co/apm/apm-server:7.10.2
    container_name: apm
    ports:
      - "8200:8200"
      - "8888:8888"
      - "8000:8000"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - XPACK_MONITORING_ENABLED=true
    networks:
      - elk-network

networks:
  elk-network:
    name: elk-network
